title: Functional Core, Imperative Shell, and Production Integration · Effects Clinic: Architecture Defense
summary: Rebuild an unreliable data-processing service as a pure decision core with explicit operational effects. Planned artifact: Add and verify the fp architecture defense increment in a production-shaped functional service and decision record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Defend functional and imperative boundaries using correctness, operability, and team-maintenance evidence.
Demonstrate behavior preservation with characterization tests and changed-case comparisons.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""python-functional immutable transformation portfolio."""

from collections.abc import Callable, Iterable, Iterator
from functools import partial, reduce
from itertools import chain, islice
from typing import TypeVar

T = TypeVar('T')
U = TypeVar('U')
